Bus Timings

91A Bus Timings Gold Souq to Jebel Ali

August 19, 2025
By Al Khaleej
Install
★★★★★ 5.0
Google Play Official App
UAE Bus Timing

Travel across the UAE with confidence. No confusion. No wasted time.

Connecting the historic Gold Souq in Deira with the industrial hub of Jebel Ali, this bus route is a lifeline for daily commuters, tourists, and residents.

Your journey on the 91A bus begins at the Gold Souq Bus Station. Nestled in the heart of Deira, this station is a stone’s throw from the famous Gold Souq. The station itself is well-equipped, offering a range of facilities to ensure a comfortable wait for your bus. And the last destination is Jebel Ali bus station which is located in Dubai’s industrial and logistic hub. Contents

91A Bus Timings

The 91A bus operates every day with a consistent schedule, ensuring that passengers have a reliable service throughout the week. The first bus depart at 05.02 AM and the last bus depart at 09.07 PM.

From Gold Souq From Jebel Ali
06:12 06:42
06:42 07:12
07:12 07:42
07:42 08:12
08:12 08:42
08:42 09:12
09:12 09:42
09:42 10:12
10:12 10:42
10:42 11:12
11:12 11:42
11:42 12:12
12:12 12:38
12:32 12:54
12:52 13:12
13:08 13:38
13:28 13:58
13:48 14:19
14:08 14:36
14:28 14:56
14:48 15:16
15:08 15:34
15:28 15:56
15:48 16:16
16:08 16:36
16:28 16:52
16:48 17:16
17:08 17:32
17:28 17:52
17:48 18:12
18:08 18:32
18:28 18:52
18:48 19:12
19:08 19:32
19:28 19:52
19:48 20:12
20:08 20:34
20:28 20: 53
20:51 21:09
21:12 21:27
21:32 21:52
21:52 22:17

The complete trip from Gold Souq to Jebel Ali typically takes about 1 hour and 20 minutes, depending on traffic conditions. Here the detailed 91a bus timetable showing the operating hours and frequency of the bus.## 91A Bus Route

The 91A bus route includes 27 stops, each serving different parts of the city and its surrounding areas. Whether you’re commuting to work, visiting friends, or exploring the city, the 91A bus offers a dependable and comfortable travel experience. And here are the stops or the route of 91a bus.

  1. Gold Souq Bus Station

  2. Naif, Intersection

  3. Al Nakhal

  4. Union Metro Bus Stop

  5. Maktoum Road

  6. Umm Hurair, Road 1

  7. Al Jafiliya Landside Metro Bus Stop

  8. Shaikh Zayed Road 1

  9. Jebel Ali Free Zone, Main Gate

  10. Dubai Ports Authority, Free Zone Office

  11. Jebel Ali Free Zone, Sony

  12. Aiwa Gulf Free Zone

Recommended Guides

Enhance your daily commute with these essential transport guides:

Complete RTA Intercity Routes Guide Largest Bus Stations Infrastructure in UAE

  1. Jebel Ali Free Zone, Roundabout 6

  2. Jebel Ali Free Zone, Lease Office 5

  3. Jebel Ali Free Zone, Nafco

  4. Container Glass Factory

  5. Zaher Group

  6. Cleveland Bridge Engineering 1 & 2

  7. Jebel Ali Free Zone, Roundabout 8

  8. Jebel Ali Free Zone, Kanoo Group 1 & 2

  9. Jebel Ali Free Zone, Roundabout 12 (1 & 2)

  10. Dubai Ports Authority, Staff Quarters

  11. Gulf Denims Limited

  12. Jebel Ali, Bus Station

Some other Dubai bus routes you can check out are the X2 bus route, which runs from Satwa Bus Station to Union Square Bus Station, and the X28, which travels from Lulu Village to Agora Mall.Read Also: C18 Bus Timings and Route ## Fare and Journey

Traveling on the 91A bus is a convenient and pleasant experience. The buses are equipped with air conditioning, comfortable seating, and designated areas for people with disabilities. The route offers a scenic view of Dubai, from the traditional markets in Deira to the modern industrial zones in Jebel Ali.

The fare for the 91a bus is only 12 AED, you can use nol card as a payment, it is Dubai’s unified public transport payment system, allowing seamless travel across buses, metros, trams, and water transport.## Journey Experience

A journey on the 91A bus route from Gold Souq to Jebel Ali offers a long but captivating ride through Dubai’s diverse urban landscape.

As the bus moves towards Jebel Ali, the scenery shifts from commercial hubs to sprawling industrial zones, showcasing Dubai’s rapid development and global economic role. The journey provides a fascinating contrast between old and new Dubai, making it an engaging experience for both residents and visitors.## Conclusion

The RTA 91A bus timings and route is a vital component of Dubai’s public transportation system, offering a reliable and efficient connection between Gold Souq in Deira and Jebel Ali. Whether you’re commuting for work, running errands, or exploring the city, the 91A bus provides a convenient and affordable travel option.

Official UAE Sources

For the latest schedules, fares, and policy updates, verify with these primary sources:

  • RTA Journey Planner
  • RTA Intercity Timetable Reference (E100)
  • Abu Dhabi Mobility
  • Sharjah Roads and Transport Authority (SRTA)

Editorial review date: August 19, 2025.
